params.name: Book of Exodus
params.description:
On Jul 27, 1403 BC, Moses led his followers on the journey out of Egypt.
To save the Hebrew people in distress, God chose Moses as the redeemer, gave him some trials, and then led him to lead his fellow countrymen across the Red Sea and out of Egypt, and brought down various miracles that made the Egyptian pharaoh who obstructed them back down. They finally arrived safely in a new land and established the law there. During this time, Moses recorded these stories, which became the classic book …
